# Application Endpoint Group (EPG)

## Get EPGs properties

Use '-o props' to get properties of selected epgs
- epg name, application profile and tenant
- preferred member
- flood
- class id
- QoS class
- isolation
- label match

```
DOC_TEMPLATE:get_aci_epg.all_properties:iserver.output.default
```
